sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104638" key="traxu/pous" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρᾱχῠ´-πους</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ποδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n104638.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rough-footed,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0086.tlg014:544b:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">544b4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
